TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Qrahu, title = Qrahu, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Qrahu} }

S.FORM: alang Qrahu ga niya mki sku Toweng si atu Hosing Ku, kwara sali buwan nya ga 63 buwan, 135 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 72% kyan ku 97 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 28% kyan ku 38 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Tayan 60%, Amis 4%, Paywan 2%, Bunun 1%, Cou 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 3%. maki qu ngasal bziran, ru kyokay. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Qrahu hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay 'zil na Qrahu hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkyahu' na Qrahu hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkraya' na Qrahu hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkraya' na Qrahu hya' ga Ngurus. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 1 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh

alang Qrahu ga niya mki sku Toweng si atu Hosing Ku, kwara sali buwan nya ga 63 buwan, 135 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 72% kyan ku 97 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 28% kyan ku 38 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Tayan 60%, Amis 4%, Paywan 2%, Bunun 1%, Cou 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 3%. maki qu ngasal bziran, ru kyokay. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Qrahu hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay 'zil na Qrahu hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkyahu' na Qrahu hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkraya' na Qrahu hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkraya' na Qrahu hya' ga Ngurus. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 1 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ qraħu ɣa nija mki s~ɕku toweŋ s~ɕi atu ħos~ɕiŋ ku, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa ** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku ** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku ** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, tajan **%, amis~ɕ *%, pajwan *%, βunun *%, ʦ~ʨou *%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran, ru kjokaj. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na qraħu ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj ʔzil na qraħu ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkjaħuʔ na qraħu ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkrajaʔ na qraħu ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkrajaʔ na qraħu ħjaʔ ɣa ŋurus~ɕ. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj maki * kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
